overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from an underwater survival game (Subnautica), showing the player swimming through a dark, bioluminescent deep-sea environment with a flashlight. The player encounters a large sea creature and navigates around a thermal vent with heavy smoke plumes.

scene_state.functional_zone: underwater cave with bioluminescent seabed flora

events.description: bright white flash and particle explosion fills the screen, possibly from creature attack or environmental hazard

agents.ego_description: swimming slowly over the rocky seabed, illuminating orange bioluminescent plants with the flashlight

entered.detail: clusters of glowing orange-yellow flora growing on the cave floor
dark rock walls of the underwater cave system

segments.scene_description: The player swims through a narrow underwater cave, illuminating bioluminescent orange plants on the seabed with a flashlight. At around 9 seconds, a sudden bright flash and particle effect fills the screen, suggesting a creature attack or environmental hazard.

events.description: large sea creature (Sea Dragon Leviathan) enters the frame from the left side

agents.ego_description: swimming upward through open water, ascending from the seabed into the water column

notable_agents.action: massive sea dragon swimming past the player from left to right in the distance

entered.detail: vast open deep sea with no visible floor or ceiling
enormous serpentine sea creature with glowing appendages
small particles and marine snow drifting in the water

segments.scene_description: The player ascends into open deep water, leaving the cave seabed behind. The environment becomes darker and more open. At 20 seconds, a massive Sea Dragon Leviathan enters from the left, swimming past the player in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep sea thermal vent with smoke plumes

events.description: approaching and entering the thermal vent area with thick smoke plumes

agents.ego_description: navigating around the thermal vent, swimming through smoke and bubbles while avoiding the hot plume

entered.detail: large white smoke and steam vent rising from the seafloor
clusters of glowing purple coral-like structures
dense bubbles and debris floating upward from the vent

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a massive thermal vent emitting thick white smoke plumes. The area features glowing purple coral formations and dense bubbling particulates. The player navigates around the vent structure, swimming through the hazy water.

agents.ego_description: swimming away from the thermal vent through a green-lit bioluminescent cave passage

entered.detail: cave passage illuminated by green bioluminescent flora on the walls

segments.scene_description: The player swims away from the thermal vent area, entering a narrower cave passage illuminated by green bioluminescent flora. The water clears as the player moves through the tunnel-like environment back toward the starting area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey that begins in a bioluminescent cave, ventures into the open deep sea, and eventually returns to a sheltered tunnel. It begins by gliding through a narrow cavern where a flashlight illuminates orange seabed plants, before a sudden bright flash and burst of particles disrupt the view. As the camera ascends into the dark, open water, a massive Sea Dragon Leviathan emerges from the left and swims past in the distance. The scene then shifts toward a towering thermal vent emitting thick white smoke plumes and surrounded by glowing purple coral, with the camera navigating through the hazy, bubbling water. Finally, the player swims away from the vent and enters a narrower passage illuminated by green bioluminescent flora as the water clears.
